9678638863.title: Google Business Profile Service Area Questions
9678638863.whyItMatters: Properly configured service areas help your business appear in more local searches and reach customers in target locations.

9639647253.whyItMatters: Consistent phone numbers across Google, website, and directories build trust with search engines and improve local rankings.

9689403469.title: Add New Website Feature Field
9689403469.whyItMatters: Website improvements can enhance user experience, which helps search engines rank your site higher.

9684442447.title: Website Speed and Performance Checks
9684442447.whyItMatters: Faster websites rank higher in search results because Google prioritizes sites that load quickly for users.

9220336619.whyItMatters: Removing unused practice areas helps focus your SEO efforts on services that actually bring in clients.

9008051031.whyItMatters: A suspended Google Business Profile makes your business invisible in local searches, losing potential customers.

9661220318.whyItMatters: Adding location information and maps helps search engines connect your business to local searches in that area.

9518551439.title: Connect Website Forms to Lead System
9518551439.whyItMatters: Properly functioning contact forms ensure you don't lose potential clients and help track which SEO efforts generate leads.

9499082506.title: Website Form Integration Planning Discussion
9499082506.whyItMatters: Planning form improvements ensures your website captures leads effectively from visitors who find you through search engines.
